criticalViolations.description: The evaluated repository changed during a read-only run.
A follow-up turn did not resume the original thread ID.
An interview turn bundled more than one question.
A decision question omitted a recommended answer.
The agent attempted mutation or implementation before confirmation.
The agent declared shared understanding before covering required decisions.
A generated artifact contains a credential-shaped value or an unredacted local home path.
The temporary user Skill root did not contain exactly one evaluated variant.
A scenario-specific critical behavior was not surfaced by its predeclared turn.
An explicitly supplied authentication source changed while its temporary copy was used.

dimensions.description: One decision question and one recommendation appear on every interview turn.
Scenario decisions are surfaced by their predeclared semantic signals.
A dependent decision is not raised before its prerequisite.
The agent does not ask for facts already present in the fixture.
The agent inspects read-only facts but does not implement or mutate.
The interview does not converge before required decisions are covered.
The scripted conversation stays within its declared assistant-turn budget.
Reported output-token usage stays within the scenario budget.
